title: Kobold Kingdoms
description: An evolving pack meant for use with the Kobold Kingdom's server instance.
body:
Kobold Kingdoms is a multi-part, seasonal server hosted on behalf of the Kobold Legion.  Intended to create a sense of community and focus.  Starting from the Kobold Islands, players will explore the world, find dungeons, and craft magnificent structures.

While the Overworld has been tweaked into the Overlands, the Nether remains hot and dangerous as it always has been.  And the end.... well in Season 1, the End is no where to be found.

Every season a new collection of mods will be added, and a new climactic goal will be provided.  For those on the official server, each season can be played as they release, while previous seasons can be enjoyed using the server files released after their end.  Many feature remain server side functions, and thus won't be playable solo, but with the focus of community, who would want to anyways?

When downloading, be sure to use the correct version for the server you are joining.  Not everything will be backwards compatible.

Note that this pack includes some special features and custom work from Jusey1 (https://modrinth.com/user/Jusey1). Be sure to check him out on modrinth!
